template_data.lead_html: Fourteen months, zero awards — then she changed one thing.

rows.what_html: Passive waiting — approved Schedule, no active outreach
Sources Sought + industry days — showing up before solicitations drop
First federal award — recompete she'd been tracking for months

template_data.closer: THE SCHEDULE IS THE START, NOT THE FINISH LINE.
template_data.image_headline: SHOW UP BEFORE ANYONE IS WATCHING
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Cream background. Left side: illustrated timeline path with three milestone icons labeled '14 MONTHS', 'SOURCES SOUGHT', 'FIRST AWARD' — each with a short 2-word descriptor beneath. Right side: illustrated professional woman in blazer looking forward confidently, holding a folder. Bold headline top: 'SHOW UP BEFORE ANYONE IS WATCHING'. One highlighted dark navy callout box with short phrase: 'PASSIVE → ACTIVE'. Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
